About this tool

RhymeForge — A Songwriter's Rhyme Engine

Find the perfect rhyme for your lyrics. RhymeForge searches 54,000+ words across five rhyme types — perfect, family, additive, assonance and consonance — so you can move past the obvious pairs and find the slant and near rhymes great songs actually use. Free, no account, no paywalls.

Part of the Undercover Zest songwriting suite — pair with the chord progression builder and CollisionLab.

Songwriter's Guide

Welcome to RhymeForge

"Good lyrics make you feel something. Great lyrics make you feel it with sounds that match." — Pat Pattison

What It Is

RhymeForge is a rhyme engine built specifically for songwriters and poets. Search over 54,000 words across five types of rhyme — from perfect rhymes for your chorus hooks to subtle assonance for verse texture.

The Five Rhyme Types

Perfect: Exact vowel + consonant match from stressed syllable ("light" → "night"). Family: Same vowel, related consonants ("light" → "ride"). Additive: Extra consonants added/dropped ("see" → "seed"). Assonance: Matching vowels, different consonants ("lake" → "rain"). Consonance: Matching consonants, different vowels ("back" → "book").

The Lyrics Pad

Open the side panel to write as you search. Keep a scratchpad for rough ideas and a clean lyrics area for your piece. Save multiple songs, load them back, and export to PDF.

Songwriter's Guide

Click "Songwriter's Guide" for deep-dive tips on rhyme strategy, thematic sound clusters, and how to pair rhyme types with different song sections and keys.

Part of the Undercover Zest songwriting suite.
